message:
fix(record): coerce task completion to Cancelled when cancel is in-flight

TaskRecord::complete() now checks if the task is in a cancel-related
state (CancelRequested, Cancelling, Finalizing) and coerces Ok(()) or
Err(_) outcomes to Cancelled with the original cancel reason. This
prevents a race where a task completes "successfully" while cancellation
is in progress, which would lose the cancellation witness.

Also initializes cancel_epoch to 1 if a Cancelled outcome arrives
without a prior request_cancel(), ensuring cancel_witness() can always
produce a valid CancelWitness for terminated-as-cancelled tasks.

New tests:
- complete_cancelled_without_prior_request_still_emits_witness
- complete_ok_after_cancel_request_becomes_cancelled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
